events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need evaluate sequence violation: rework without disposition. In heavy industrial quality, rework must be dispositioned (MRB, concession, repair procedure approved) before continuing. Observed in-progress rework without disposition. Decision fail. Risk high. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 50? Value irrelevant 0. Sound_source etc default empty string/0. Findings: rework being performed without prior disposition or approved rework plan; nonconformance not documented. Actions: stop work, hold material, initiate NCR/MRB disposition, obtain approved rework procedure, reinspect before continuing. Rationale. References: site quality procedures, ISO 9001, ASME/NBIC? Since heavy industrial maybe ASME, but site quality procedures. Need produce valid JSON only.
